name: Zhug (Yemen Spice)
recipeInstructions:
In Yemen, this is the traditional spice mix. Use as a table condiment.
1. Finely chop the red peppers and chilies, removing the seeds.
2. Chop the coriander leaves.
3. Blend or pound all the ingredients to a paste.
4. Store in a jar in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
